summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merges, closes, labels, comments, or fix PRs are planned. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined individually; unrelated open PRs are kept open or escalated only where the hydrated artifact shows unresolved maintainer/review judgment.
